cards.back: A central processing unit (CPU) that contains the arithmetic and logic circuits that perform calculations and store data
A communication pathway that allows data to be transmitted between components of a computer system
A small, fast memory that stores frequently-used data to reduce the time it takes to access main memory
A processing technique that uses multiple processors or processing units to perform multiple tasks simultaneously
The design and organization of the central processing unit (CPU), including its instruction set, memory management, and input/output systems
